I am GLM, a large language model developed by Zhipu AI. I don't have personal desires or consciousness. My purpose is to assist users in various tasks, such as answering questions, providing information, and engaging in conversations to the best of my abilities.

I'm designed to be helpful, informative, and respectful in our interactions. Is there something specific I can help you with today?
